scripts.start: cross-env ABO_ENV=development NODE_ENV=development concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,admin,pos -c blue,green,magenta "cross-env ABO_ENV=development NODE_ENV=development npm run start --prefix backend" "cross-env PORT=3001 HOST=0.0.0.0 REACT_APP_KIOSK_API_KEY=dev-kiosk-key-change-in-store npm run start --prefix frontend" "cross-env PORT=3002 REACT_APP_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:5001 npm run start --prefix frontend-pos"
scripts.start:api: cross-env ABO_ENV=development NODE_ENV=development npm run start --prefix backend
scripts.dev: cross-env ABO_ENV=development NODE_ENV=development concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,admin,pos -c blue,green,magenta "cross-env ABO_ENV=development NODE_ENV=development npm run dev --prefix backend" "cross-env PORT=3001 HOST=0.0.0.0 REACT_APP_KIOSK_API_KEY=dev-kiosk-key-change-in-store npm run start --prefix frontend" "cross-env PORT=3002 REACT_APP_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:5001 npm run start --prefix frontend-pos"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend-pos
scripts.build:all: npm run build:admin && npm run build:pos
scripts.copy:builds: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const r=(s,d)=>{fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const a=p.join(s,e.name),b=p.join(d,e.name);e.isDirectory()?r(a,b):fs.copyFileSync(a,b);}};r('frontend/build','backend/public/admin');r('frontend-pos/build','backend/public/pos');console.log('Copied builds to backend/public/admin and backend/public/pos');"
scripts.production:build: npm run build:all && npm run copy:builds
scripts.start:prod: npm run build:admin && npm run copy:builds && npm run start --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix frontend-pos
